channel.title: Cursor Blog
channel.description: Cursor Blog — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: Bugbot is now over 3x faster, 22% cheaper, and finds 10% more bugs
item.description: Bugbot is now over 3x faster, 22% cheaper, and finds 10% more bugs

item.title: Governing agent autonomy with Auto-review
item.description: Auto-review uses a classifier agent to govern local agent autonomy, allowing low-stakes actions to run freely while slowing down when an action crosses a meaningful boundary.
